rule: Every forced route or action failure condition must expose a domain-specific recovery path and complete the original intent after recovery.

actionResults.expectedResult: Explain the denied device permission and provide settings, fallback and cancel actions.
actionResults.observedResult: Permission denial offered settings, a usable fallback and cancellation without losing context.
